title: cephalaria gazipashensis subsp. pilifera
intro: Cephalaria gazipashensis subsp. pilifera is a plant species, commonly known as a type of goat's beard, belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Cephalaria gazipashensis subsp. pilifera is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
